pdg_node.statement: (prop_vals: ColVec_t, prev_vals: ColVec_t, vals_bound: bool, mala_mean_fn: Callable, target_data: Any, step_size: fp_t) -> tuple[ColVec_t, ColVec_t, Mat_t, Mat_t]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Computes the MALA proposal means for both previous and proposed states by calling the mean function. If parameters are bounded, it also retrieves the corresponding inverse Jacobian matrices.

declaration.name: compute_proposal_means_and_jacobians
declaration.type_signature: (prop_vals: ColVec_t, prev_vals: ColVec_t, vals_bound: bool, mala_mean_fn: Callable, target_data: Any, step_size: fp_t) -> tuple[ColVec_t, ColVec_t, Mat_t, Mat_t]
declaration.docstring: Computes the MALA proposal means for both previous and proposed states by calling the mean function. If parameters are bounded, it also retrieves the corresponding inverse Jacobian matrices.

pdg_node.statement: (prop_vals: ColVec_t, prev_vals: ColVec_t, prop_mean: ColVec_t, prev_mean: ColVec_t, prop_inv_jacob: Mat_t, vals_bound: bool, step_size: fp_t, precond_mat: Mat_t) -> fp_t
pdg_node.informal_desc: Calculates the log-ratio of the reverse-to-forward proposal densities using multivariate normal PDFs. It adjusts the covariance matrix based on whether the parameters are bounded (using Jacobians).

declaration.name: calculate_proposal_log_density_ratio
declaration.type_signature: (prop_vals: ColVec_t, prev_vals: ColVec_t, prop_mean: ColVec_t, prev_mean: ColVec_t, prop_inv_jacob: Mat_t, vals_bound: bool, step_size: fp_t, precond_mat: Mat_t) -> fp_t
declaration.docstring: Calculates the log-ratio of the reverse-to-forward proposal densities using multivariate normal PDFs. It adjusts the covariance matrix based on whether the parameters are bounded (using Jacobians).
